#8-Queens board problem
= 8-Queens problem =

Goal: to place 8 queens on the chess board so that they do not check each other. The boar is initially empty, and queens must be inserted one by one. 

= Solutions =

For 8-queen, we have 92 solutions. If we exclude symmetry, there are possible 12 solutions.
One possible solution:

http://www.codeproject.com/KB/java/EightQueen/EightQueen.jpg
